subcodes.first_line: The Most Hidden One, magnified be His glory and exalted be His grandeur, hath willed manifestation and through the Word "Be" hath spoken, whereupon it appeared [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: غیب منیع جل جلاله و جلت عظمته اراده ظهور فرموده و بکلمه کن نطق اذا ظهرت
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @business; financial; property matters, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
